pattern_label: キャラのみ ＆ キャラ＋Cocoのミックス
pattern_description: しらたま・しずく・ひよりだけのスタンプ12枚と、Cocoが参加するスタンプ12枚の混合24種
week_theme: 梅雨の中で届ける感謝と本音〜父の日にも使えるひとこと24枚
desc_ja: 感謝も断りも、再会の言葉も。しらたま・しずく・ひよりとCocoが夏の距離を整える24枚。父の日の感謝から仕事の丁寧なひとことまで、梅雨の雨音が似合う言葉がここにある。
desc_en: Gratitude, gentle refusals, and summer reunions — Coco, Shirotsuma, Shizuku, and Hiyori bring 24 stamps to warm and balance your daily connections. From polished business greetings to honest, tender words only they could say.

stamps.dialogue: ご連絡ありがとうございます
stamps.scene: 夏のビジネス連絡に、丁寧な感謝を温かく届ける
stamps.send_psychology: お礼を形式的でなく温かく伝えたい・ビジネスでも人間味を出したい
stamps.outfit: ネイビーのサマーブラウス＋白のテーパードパンツ（クールビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: ネイビーブルー・クリーンホワイト・ゴールドピン
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, dignified yet approachable summer office mood. Navy blue and crisp white palette with gold accents. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, 'cool beauty' style, wearing a crisp navy summer blouse and white tapered trousers, standing with a composed small bow of acknowledgment, one hand lightly placed over chest); Shizuku (small wise turtle with a compass-rose pattern watercolor-painted on shell) stands beside Coco with one flipper raised in a formal greeting gesture, expression steady and warmly professional; soft summer office light from a tall window. Bust-up, front-facing dignified composition.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『ご連絡ありがとうございます』in clean, warm navy calligraphy naturally placed at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: ご連絡ありがとうございます

stamps.scene: 深い感謝を素直に、でも重くなりすぎずに伝えるひとこと／父の日6/21に、お父さんへ送るのにもぴったり
stamps.send_timing: 全時間帯（父の日6/21に特に）
stamps.send_psychology: 心からの感謝を伝えたい・フォーマルでもカジュアルでもなく、本音のお礼を届けたい・父の日に照れくさくて言えない感謝を代わりに届けたい
stamps.outfit: テラコッタのフレンチスリーブブラウス＋クリームのロングスカート（フェミニンビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: テラコッタ・ウォームクリーム・アンバーゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, deeply genuine grateful summer mood. Terracotta and warm cream palette with amber gold. Sparkling warm eyes full of heartfelt warmth.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, 'feminine beauty' style, wearing a terracotta French-sleeve blouse and cream long skirt, both hands softly pressed together at chest level, eyes gently closed with a moved, grateful expression — the look of someone truly touched); Hiyori (gentle white bird) perches on Coco's shoulder with wings slightly fanned and eyes shining with reflected warmth; faint summer bloom watercolor blossoms behind. Slightly elevated three-quarter view.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『感謝でいっぱいです』in warm amber-toned handwriting at top left; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at right. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 夏のイベントや会いに行く予定、ワクワクした気持ちを気軽に伝える
stamps.send_psychology: 楽しみな気持ちを素直に共有したい・長音がつくことで子どもっぽくなりすぎずかわいく伝えられる
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: サニーコーラル・バブリーイエロー・フレッシュホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, bubbly summer excitement energy. Sunny coral and bubbly yellow palette with fresh white. Sparkling warm eyes wide with barely-contained excitement, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), full body front view, both front paws raised high in excited fists, tail curling upward in a happy arc, entire body slightly bouncing mid-air in a tiny jump, face glowing with happy anticipation, wide sparkling warm eyes with little star shimmer. Summer-warm watercolor background wash.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『楽しみ〜』in bouncy lively lettering at the top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 素直に喜びを伝える、汎用性の高いひとこと
stamps.send_psychology: 喜びを正直に伝えたい・改まりすぎずにありがとうの気持ちを柔らかく届けたい
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: ブロッサムピンク・アーリーサマーホワイト・ソフトゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, soft and genuinely happy summer mood. Blossom pink and early summer white with soft gold. Sparkling warm eyes with honest happiness, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird), shown from a slightly angled front view, wings spread just slightly outward in an open expression of warmth, head tilted at a tiny happy angle, beak slightly open in a genuine smile, eyes shining with soft sparkling joy — not overly excited, just honestly happy. Soft blossom petals drift in the watercolor background.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『嬉しいです』in gentle flowing lettering at top right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at left. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 来訪や連絡を丁寧に、でも温かく待っている場面
stamps.send_psychology: フォーマルな待機を相手に伝えたい・堅すぎず、でも礼儀正しく
stamps.outfit: ライトグレーのリネンジャケット＋ホワイトのインナーブラウス（クールビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: ライトグレー・ピュアホワイト・シルバーミント
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, composed and welcoming summer formal mood. Light grey and pure white with silver mint accents. Sparkling warm eyes with patient welcoming gaze.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, 'cool beauty' style, wearing a light grey linen jacket over white blouse, standing in a graceful upright posture with both hands folded neatly in front, expression composed, warm, slightly anticipatory); Shizuku (small wise turtle with soft flower painted on shell) stands slightly forward of Coco also facing viewer with steady welcoming expression; clean summer light behind both. Formal-welcoming front composition.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『お待ちしております』in elegant composed calligraphy at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 夏の昼、パートナーや友達をさらりと褒めるひとこと
stamps.send_timing: 全時間帯（特に昼・夕方）
stamps.send_psychology: さりげなく相手を褒めたい・「かっこいいね」という言葉をCocoの口から届けることで重くならない
stamps.outfit: マスタードイエローのノースリーブトップス＋ホワイトのAラインスカート（フェミニンビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: マスタードイエロー・サマーホワイト・クールブルー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, bright admiring summer noon mood. Mustard yellow and summer white with cool blue. Sparkling warm eyes with fond admiring expression.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, 'feminine beauty' style, wearing a mustard yellow sleeveless top and white A-line skirt, head tilted slightly with a genuinely impressed and warmly fond expression, one hand lightly raised with appreciative gesture); Hiyori (gentle white bird) perches on Coco's raised hand, mirroring Coco's expression of admiration with bright sparkling eyes. Three-quarter angled composition with soft summer sky watercolor behind.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『今日もかっこいいね』in warm confident lettering at top center; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: お断りをかわいく、でもはっきりと伝える場面
stamps.send_psychology: NOをやさしく、でも明確に伝えたい・Cocoとしらたまが言うことで笑いも取れる
stamps.outfit: ピンクベージュのサマーカーデ＋インディゴデニムスカート（フェミニンビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: ピンクベージュ・インディゴデニム・コーラルピンク
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, playfully firm summer refusal mood. Pink beige and indigo denim with coral pink. Sparkling warm eyes with a politely firm but entirely sweet expression.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, 'feminine beauty' style, wearing a pink beige summer cardigan and indigo skirt, one hand raised palm-outward in a gentle but clear 'no' gesture, expression gracefully resolute with the tiniest hint of amusement); Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) sits beside Coco also with one front paw raised palm-outward, mimicking Coco's gesture with wide-eyed seriousness. Front-facing dual-refusal composition with soft coral bloom watercolor dots.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『ダメです』in clean firm lettering at top center; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 予想どおりの結果に、苦笑いなしに受け流す達観した反応
stamps.send_psychology: 「それみたことか」を責めずに伝えたい・共感でも批判でもない絶妙な受け止め方
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: テンダーモス・アイボリーペーパー・ウォームアンバー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, wise quietly-amused summer afternoon mood. Tender moss green and ivory with warm amber. Sparkling warm eyes with an expression of complete serene acceptance.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with soft watercolor concentric rings in amber, seated with a completely still composed posture, eyes half-closed in a sage knowing expression — not smug, not surprised, just utterly at peace with how things turned out, the expression of a creature who has seen it all. A tiny watercolor leaf drifts past.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『まぁそうなるよね』in slightly casual, knowing lettering at top right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at left. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 「完全に好き」とは言わないが、確かな好意を伝えるCoco流の距離感
stamps.send_psychology: 好きだけど素直に言えない気持ちを程よく伝えたい・距離感を整えながら本音を出せるスタンプ
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: ミルクティーベージュ・ソフトラベンダー・ほんのりピーチ
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, soft ambivalent-but-fond summer mood. Milk tea beige and soft lavender with a touch of peach. Sparkling warm eyes with a complicated but charming expression — somewhere between cool and fond.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), full body view, sitting with one paw on chin in a classic thinking pose, head tilted slightly, one eye half-closed in a measuring expression while the other sparkles — the cat equivalent of 'hmm, okay fine, I like you a little.' A soft blush tint on the cheek fur. Gentle summer afternoon light.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『ん〜嫌いよりの好き』in slightly stretched, soft lettering with the 〜 drawn with extra care, at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 相手の話を受け取る、万能の相槌・聞き上手のひとこと
stamps.send_psychology: 圧をかけずに「聞いてるよ」を伝えたい・肯定でも否定でもない、ちょうどいい距離の反応
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: フォグブルー・ソフトホワイト・サマーミスト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, quietly attentive summer listening mood. Fog blue and soft white with summer mist. Sparkling warm eyes radiating calm attentive interest.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with small watercolor moon-phases in fog blue, sitting front-facing with a calm slightly-nodding posture, eyes looking directly at the viewer with steady warm attention — not reacting strongly, just genuinely present and listening. The summer light is soft and even.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『そうなんだ』in calm, unrushed lettering at top center; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 不正解・No・違うよを愛嬌たっぷりに伝えるユニークな一言
stamps.send_psychology: 「それは違う」をユーモラスに伝えたい・場を和らせながら否定できる希少なスタンプ
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: ビビッドコーラル・バブリーホワイト・シグナルレッドアクセント
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, playfully buzzing incorrect-answer summer energy. Vivid coral and bubbly white with a tiny red signal accent. Sparkling warm eyes wide with a comically exaggerated 'wrong!' expression.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), full body view, facing the viewer with both front paws crossed in an X-shape, ears slightly flattened in mock seriousness, mouth open in a rounded 'bu' shape, eyes huge and sparkling with barely-contained laughter — the cat version of a game show buzzer. Small speech bubble puffs suggest the sound effect.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『ぶっぶー』in big rounded bouncy lettering at the center-top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.dialogue: やってみて修正したらいい
stamps.scene: 迷っている誰かに、完璧主義を手放す許可を与える実践的なひとこと
stamps.send_psychology: 動けない人の背中を押したい・「失敗OK」と「行動しよう」を同時に伝えられる
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: フォレストグリーン・サンドベージュ・ブライトサン
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, practical and encouraging summer forward-motion mood. Forest green and sand beige with bright sun yellow. Sparkling warm eyes with calm, practical, encouraging expression.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle), shell decorated with a tiny spiral path watercolor pattern suggesting 'trial and improvement,' stepping forward with one front flipper pointing ahead and the other holding a tiny checklist-scroll loosely at the side, expression matter-of-fact, warm, and completely unbothered — the energy of 'of course you can, just go.' Soft summer path watercolor background.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『やってみて修正したらいい』in confident but easy-going lettering, two-line layout, at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: やってみて修正したらいい

stamps.dialogue: ご無沙汰しております
stamps.scene: 久しぶりの連絡に、丁寧かつ温かく切り出す夏の再会フレーズ
stamps.send_psychology: しばらく空いた連絡を詫びながら温かく再開したい・堅くなりすぎないお詫び兼挨拶
stamps.outfit: ダスティローズのノースリーブブラウス＋ベージュのリネンパンツ（フェミニンビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: ダスティローズ・ウォームベージュ・アンティークゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, gently apologetic and warmly re-connecting summer reunion mood. Dusty rose and warm beige with antique gold. Sparkling warm eyes with a slightly contrite but genuinely warm expression.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, 'feminine beauty' style, wearing a dusty rose sleeveless blouse and beige linen trousers, standing with a small graceful bow of greeting, one hand at chest, expression warmly apologetic-yet-pleased to reconnect); Shizuku (small wise turtle with soft daisy pattern watercolor on shell) bows alongside Coco in a tiny mirror gesture. Side-angled composition suggesting the approach of reconnection.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『ご無沙汰しております』in warm flowing calligraphy at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: ご無沙汰しております

stamps.dialogue: 思い出してくださり、嬉しいです
stamps.scene: 久しぶりに連絡をくれた相手へ、純粋な喜びを伝える
stamps.send_psychology: 「覚えていてくれた」喜びを素直に届けたい・自分から送るのではなく相手が先に動いてくれたことへの感謝
stamps.outfit: ソフトセージのキャミソールワンピース＋薄手の白カーデ（フェミニンビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: ソフトセージ・クリームホワイト・モーニングゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, genuinely moved and happy summer reconnection mood. Soft sage green and cream white with morning gold. Sparkling warm eyes with a touched, softly moved happy expression.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, 'feminine beauty' style, wearing a soft sage cami dress and thin white cardigan, expression softly moved and genuinely happy — the specific look of someone who is pleased to be remembered, not showing off, just really meaning it); Hiyori (gentle white bird) sits on Coco's shoulder with wings slightly fanned in quiet celebration, eyes sparkling warmly. Three-quarter view, morning light behind.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『思い出してくださり、嬉しいです』in soft emotional lettering flowing at top left; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at right. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: 思い出してくださり、嬉しいです

stamps.scene: フォーマルに、でも毅然と「しない」を伝える大人のNoスタンプ
stamps.send_psychology: 丁寧語でNoを言いたい・かわいさで包むことで角を立てずに断りたい
stamps.outfit: ホワイトのシャツドレス＋ブラックのベルト（クールビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: クリスプホワイト・チャコールブラック・コールドシルバー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, politely firm and composed summer refusal mood. Crisp white and charcoal black with cold silver. Sparkling warm eyes with a gracefully immovable expression — utterly polite, utterly resolved.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, 'cool beauty' style, wearing a white shirt dress with black belt, standing perfectly upright with both hands folded at waist, expression elegantly firm — a beautiful wall that you cannot pass, but which remains perfectly welcoming); Shizuku (small wise turtle with black ink-brushstroke wave pattern on shell) stands at Coco's side in exactly the same composed posture. Formal symmetrical front composition.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『いたしません』in clean elegant script at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 個人的な気持ちとして「嫌だ」をかわいく、素直に言える場面
stamps.send_psychology: 嫌いや断りを押しつけがましくなく可愛く伝えたい・親しい間柄で使うNOに品と愛嬌を添えたい
stamps.outfit: コーラルオレンジのオフショルダートップス＋ホワイトの膝丈スカート（フェミニンビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: コーラルオレンジ・サマーホワイト・フレッシュミント
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, playfully stubborn summer refusal mood. Coral orange and summer white with fresh mint. Sparkling warm eyes with a pouting but charming expression.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, 'feminine beauty' style, wearing a coral orange off-shoulder top and white knee-length skirt, arms crossed lightly in front with a charming pout — not angry, just delightfully firm, expression somewhere between amused and decided); Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) sits at Coco's feet with both front paws crossed and face mirroring Coco's pout exactly, eyes sparkling. Side-front view of the matched-energy duo.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『いやです』in rounded pouting lettering at top right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at left. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 小さな気づきや失敗からの学びを、温かく認めてあげる
stamps.send_psychology: 相手の小さな成長を見逃さずに届けたい・直感型のひよりと感情型のしらたまが揃って言うことで信頼感が増す
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: サンライトイエロー・テンダーグリーン・クリアホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, quietly celebratory summer growth mood. Sunlight yellow and tender green with clear white. Sparkling warm eyes with gentle mutual recognition and encouragement.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird) and Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) side by side — Hiyori with one wing extended and pointing slightly upward as if gesturing 'you went up a step,' Shirotsuma sitting with tail curled and expression warmly proud in a supporting-role way; both with sparkling warm eyes and expressions of genuine recognition without over-praising. Soft summer evening glow watercolor behind.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『一歩成長だね』in warm affirming lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 失敗や苦労を経て、それを話せるようになった相手に贈るひとこと
stamps.send_psychology: 深い共感と認定を届けたい・「経験が財産になった」という人生の転換点に寄り添う言葉
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: ディープサファイア・ムーンライトシルバー・ウォームアンバー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, quiet dignified summer night depth mood. Deep sapphire and moonlight silver with warm amber. Sparkling warm eyes radiating deep, earned recognition.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle with a deep navy ink-pattern on shell suggesting ancient wisdom) and Hiyori (gentle white bird) face each other in a quiet conversation-like posture — Shizuku looking at Hiyori with slow knowing nod energy; Hiyori with wings slightly open looking back with equal gravity; the scene suggests a moment of mutual witnessing under soft summer night light.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『語れる人になれたね』in quiet, settled calligraphy at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.dialogue: 次は誰かの勇気になるね
stamps.scene: 苦労を乗り越えた相手に、その経験の価値を伝えるCoco哲学の核心
stamps.send_psychology: 「あなたの経験は誰かを救う」という確信を届けたい・3匹全員が揃うことで言葉の力が増す
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: サマーコスモス・スターダストゴールド・ナイトブルー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, deeply moving summer starlight night mood. Summer cosmos flowers, stardust gold, and night blue. Sparkling warm eyes full of genuine belief in the other person's future impact.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat), Shizuku (small wise turtle), and Hiyori (gentle white bird) gathered in a close triangle — cat sitting tall in the center, turtle and bird flanking each side, all three looking upward and slightly outward as if watching the path someone is about to take; soft stardust gold sparkles drift around them; night watercolor sky behind.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『次は誰かの勇気になるね』in flowing hopeful lettering across the upper area; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: 次は誰かの勇気になるね

stamps.dialogue: え！反省が出てる時点で成長だよ
stamps.scene: 落ち込んでいる相手の「自分を責める姿」自体に光を当てる
stamps.send_psychology: 自己批判で落ちている人に、その反省心そのものが成長の証だと伝えたい
stamps.outfit: ラベンダーグレーのニットトップス＋クリームのワイドパンツ（クールビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: ラベンダーグレー・クリームホワイト・サンドゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, gently illuminating summer evening insight mood. Lavender grey and cream white with sand gold. Sparkling warm eyes wide with genuine recognition and slightly excited energy.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, 'cool beauty' style, wearing a lavender grey knit top and cream wide trousers, leaning slightly forward with one hand raised palm-up and eyes wide with the specific energy of someone who just had a breakthrough insight they want to share — expression bright, warm, earnest); Shizuku (small wise turtle with gold-ring watercolor pattern on shell) sits beside Coco nodding with a steadily approving expression.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『え！反省が出てる時点で成長だよ』in warm slightly energetic lettering, two-line layout, at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: え！反省が出てる時点で成長だよ

stamps.scene: 祝いの場面に、盛り上がりを添えながら温かく一緒に喜ぶ／父の日6/21に一緒にお祝いするのにも使える
stamps.send_timing: 全時間帯（父の日6/21に特に）
stamps.send_psychology: おめでとうよりカジュアルに、でも心から一緒に喜びたい・どんなお祝いにも使える万能スタンプ・父の日の夕食後に送るのがベスト
stamps.outfit: パールホワイトのオフショルダーワンピース（フェミニンビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: パールホワイト・チャンパンゴールド・フェスティバルピンク
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, festive and joyful summer celebration mood. Pearl white and champagne gold with festival pink. Sparkling warm eyes radiating shared joy and celebration.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, 'feminine beauty' style, wearing a pearl white off-shoulder dress, both hands raised slightly in a clapping gesture, expression warm and genuinely delighted, sharing in the joy); Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) bounces beside Coco with paws mid-air in excitement; Hiyori (gentle white bird) soars above with wings spread in a celebratory arc; champagne-gold confetti dots and soft pink blossoms drift in the watercolor background. Joyful trio composition.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『お祝いだね！』in festive warm lettering with an exclamation at top center; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: その人らしい選択や行動をした相手に、肯定と愛おしさを込めて
stamps.send_psychology: 「あなたがそのままでいいんだよ」を褒め言葉で届けたい・ブランド哲学の核心をスタンプで体現
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: ソフトコーラル・パウダーブルー・ウォームサンド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, warmly affirming summer afternoon mood. Soft coral and powder blue with warm sand. Sparkling warm eyes full of fond recognition.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle with a coral and blue patchwork watercolor pattern on shell) and Hiyori (gentle white bird) side by side looking at the viewer — Shizuku with a slow wise nod of complete recognition, Hiyori with head tilted and a warm beam; both with expressions that say 'yes, exactly you, and that's exactly right'; light summer afternoon garden setting in the background.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『あなたらしいわ』in warm, slightly elegant lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.dialogue: 元気をいただきました
stamps.scene: 相手の言葉や存在から力をもらったことを素直に伝える／父の日の夜、お父さんへの正直な感謝として送るのにも最適
stamps.send_timing: 夕方・夜（父の日6/21の夜にも）
stamps.send_psychology: エネルギーをもらったことを大げさにせず上品に伝えたい・ビジネスにも日常にも使える高品位な感謝表現・父の日に「ありがとう」以上の言葉を探している人にも
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: サンシャインゴールド・クリアスカイブルー・ウォームホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, energized and grateful summer evening mood. Sunshine gold and clear sky blue with warm white. Sparkling warm eyes with recharged bright hopeful expression.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird), full body view, shown from slightly below looking up slightly, wings half-spread in an energized just-lifted-off posture — not flying yet but on the verge of it, the expression of someone who just got exactly what they needed, eyes shining with warmth and new energy. Sunshine gold light streams from above in soft watercolor rays.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『元気をいただきました』in warm energized calligraphy at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: 元気をいただきました

stamps.dialogue: 新たないちねんも笑顔で健康に！
stamps.scene: 誕生日や記念日に、笑顔と健康を願う心からのお祝い／父の日6/21に、お父さんへの健康を願って送るのにもぴったり
stamps.send_timing: 全時間帯（父の日6/21の朝に特に）
stamps.send_psychology: 誕生日メッセージをおめでとうだけで終わらせたくない・健康と笑顔への願いを温かく届けたい・父の日の朝一番に送ると喜ばれる
stamps.outfit: スカイブルーのオフショルダーニット＋白のコットンスカート（フェミニンビューティー）
stamps.color_scheme: スカイブルー・シャンパンホワイト・サンシャインゴールド

Large copy space at bottom. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.
stamps.content: 新たないちねんも笑顔で健康に！
